heading: Introduction, manufacture for introduction, transportation or distribution in interstate commerce; penalty
label: 1242 Introduction, manufacture for introduction, transportation or distribution in interstate commerce; penalty
text: Whoever knowingly introduces, or manufactures for introduction, into interstate commerce, or transports or distributes in interstate commerce, any switchblade knife, shall be fined not more than $2,000 or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 12, 1958section 6 of Pub. L. 85–623section 1241 of this title
